opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My feet are burning so badly I can't put on socks, they are bright red, and earlier tonight I went completely blind in my right eye for about ten minutes.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning in both feet came on suddenly tonight and paracetamol did nothing, and a couple of hours ago my right eye went dark like a curtain for about ten minutes before it came back — I'm frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: the foot burning started suddenly tonight; the vision loss happened about two hours ago and lasted around ten minutes
symptom_narrative.duration: feet burning for a few hours and ongoing; the eye blindness lasted about ten minutes then fully resolved
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning, throbbing, on-fire feeling in both feet with bright redness; the eye event was a painless dark curtain coming down over the right eye
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the foot pain is unbearable, I can't stand or put anything on my feet
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both feet and toes; and separately my right eye earlier
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: feet are constantly burning and worse in the warm; the vision loss was a single episode that came and went
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my feet bare in front of a fan in the cool air helps the burning a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: warmth and a warm room make the foot burning much worse; standing on them is agony
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've had a dull headache that won't go away for about two months, I've felt generally run down, and I've had a few mild nosebleeds over the past week
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — the burning feet and the eye going dark are both new tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed keeping my feet in the cool air because I can't bear to walk on them

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious about the temporary loss of vision

objective_data_offered.value: both feet and toes look bright red on camera and the patient is holding them bare in front of a fan
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour and swelling judged from a phone camera in home lighting — not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: the patient says her feet feel intensely hot to touch and are burning
36.7 degrees on a home thermometer, so no fever
